---
title: "Chinese Development Projects Analysis"
author: ""
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
jupyter: python3
---

## Overview

This analysis visualizes Chinese development projects around the world using data from AidData's China's Global Loans and Grants Dataset, Version 1.0.

## Geographic Distribution of Projects
```{python}
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px
from ChinaDev import clg, fig
# Count projects by country
fig.show()
```
